use_cases: Tab-based navigation between content sections in dashboard interfaces
Segmented control for filtering data views in SaaS applications
Category switching in e-commerce product listings
Mode toggling in editor interfaces or settings panels
Step-by-step wizard navigation in multi-step forms
ai_summary: A versatile capsule-style tab and button component with multiple visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes. Built with Radix UI's Slot for composition, featuring proper focus states, hover effects, and shadow styling. Supports asChild pattern for flexible composition. Ideal for creating navigation tabs, segmented controls, or interactive button groups in modern web applications.
